title: Make Location Column More Flexible

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The location column is too strict and requires to equal exactly as it appears in Google Maps. Not always are addresses available on Google Maps, causing location addresses to fail.

What are you trying to achieve

The location column should be more flexible to accommodate addresses that may or may not be available on Google Maps, or more accommodating with language-specific addresses.

An additional solution would be to permit Text to Location conversion in Workflow Builder.
